summary: Tested all 5 component updates for March 2026 homepage P0 CTA audit + hero right panel readability. All 24 checks passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All homepage CTA changes validated. Hero right panel legible (11px labels, 14px card titles, 0.82 opacity domain names, $10,000–$25,000+ on one line). MidPageStatement shows 16 deadly sins teaser with correct 4 sins and view-16-sins-link to /standards/16-deadly-sins. EngagementSection has primary 'Run the Authority Readiness Test →' btn (engagement-readiness-test-btn) ABOVE secondary 'Begin Ground 0 →'. AuthorityReadinessTestSection btn reads 'RUN THE AUTHORITY READINESS TEST →'. VinceCTASection btn reads 'Run the Authority Readiness Test →' linking to /reach-diagnostic. ComplianceMapTeaser has self-serve copy and 'Explore the Standards Library →' link to /standards. No pricing on homepage.
